subcodes.first_line: The Glory calleth out: "Where are the people of fidelity, in whose faces shineth forth the radiance of God, the Lord of Names?" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ینادی البهاء این اهل الوفاء الذین یری فی وجوههم نضره الله مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @chastisement and requital, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
